data.content: Implementation change is plausible and repo gates pass in /Users/cartine/foolery/.claude/worktrees/foolery-7e6d-terminal-rehydration (lint warning-only, tsc, test, build). Review is rejected because required behavior is not validated: there is no test covering useRehydrateTerminals calling listSessions() when local terminals are empty, and no multi-context Playwright validation that a fresh Browser B discovers active terminals, receives live status/SSE updates, and can use terminal controls like stop.
